items.name: eval_file
items.doc: Load and evaluate a single `.rhai` file via the gateway.

items.name: load_all
items.signature: pub fn load_all(dir: &Path) -> Result<HashMap<String, ViewConfig>, ViewConfigError>
items.doc:
Scan `dir/*.rhai` and return a map of `{stem → ViewConfig}`.
Missing or empty directory is not an error — returns an empty map.
